title: metaswarm pack-format 0.1 manifest schema
description: Structural validation for `pack.yaml` (after YAML parse to JSON). Locked by ADR-0002 (envelope), ADR-0004 (capability ontology + runtime_bindings + credentials), ADR-0005 (side_effect_profile multidimensional + conflict-policy fields), ADR-0009 (credentials.required logical-name shape). Cross-field constraints (e.g., extends-target resolution, dependency cycles) live in dedicated semantic validators per ADR-0002; this schema is intentionally structural-only (invariant 3).

identifier.description: Slug-style identifier: lowercase alphanumerics, hyphens, dots, slashes, underscores. Names of packs, agents, skills, rubrics, workflows, runtime adapters.

semverString.description: Semantic version string per https://semver.org. Permits standard MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH plus optional pre-release and build metadata.

semverRange.description: Loose semver range string (e.g. '>=0.11', '^1.2', '~0.3'). Full range syntax matches npm semver; this schema validates only the 'non-empty' shape, deferring detailed range parsing to PackLoader.

capabilityId.description: Capability identifier of the form `<namespace>.<name>/v<MAJOR>` per ADR-0004. v0 closed set: `routing.task-router/v1`, `integrations.provider/v1`, `credentials.resolver/v1`. Schema accepts the lexical shape; semantic validation against the closed v0 set happens in PackLoader.

schemaRef.description: Reference to a JSON Schema file (relative path) or an inline JSON Schema object would be permitted in a future extension; v0 schema accepts the path form.

sideEffectProfile.description: Multidimensional side-effect profile per ADR-0005 (invariant 18). The PermissionRegistry derives the policy class from these three orthogonal axes (invariant 19).

bindingSpec.description: Runtime-adapter-specific binding shape. v0 ships the `ts-module` shape; future runtimes (Python, gRPC) extend this map.

routingHint.description: L1 routing-hint entry. Either a `keyword` or a `tag` with a numeric weight. Default scorer aggregates these per ADR-0006.

actionDecl.description: Action declaration in `integrations.actions` per ADR-0004 (Modello A). Each action is opaque on business semantics but governable on metadata (invariant 12).

idempotency.description: Optional idempotency declaration; v0 captures it as a free-form string. ADR-0005 defers per-action retry/circuit-breaker policy.

credentialDecl.description: Logical credential entry per ADR-0009 §5. `logical` is the pack-internal name resolved via `credentials.resolver/v1.get(logical)`; `scope` is a free-form scope hint consumed by the resolver (e.g. `read-only`, `write`).

pack_format.description: Manifest envelope contract version per ADR-0002. v0 accepts only the value '0.1'; loaders reject `pack_format` major higher than their own.

runtimes.description: Runtime adapters this pack supports. v0 mandatory keys: must include both `claude-code` AND `mock` (ADR-0004 §'v0 mandatory binding keys').

packs.description: Optional pack dependencies (ADR-0005). Cycle detection lives in PackDependencyValidator (semantic validator, invariant 3).

runtime_bindings.description: Per-runtime-keyed binding map (ADR-0004 revision). Outer key = capability id; inner key = runtime adapter id; value = adapter-specific binding spec. v0 mandatory: every entry under `provides.capabilities` must have both `claude-code` and `mock` inner keys. Structural shape only here; the cross-field RuntimeBindingsCompletenessValidator (WU2) checks the cross-field constraint.

required.description: v0 supports two shapes for credentials.required: (a) array of `{logical, scope}` objects per ADR-0009; (b) empty array. The minimal-pack fixture uses (b). When non-empty, each entry must follow shape (a).

permissions.description: Permission declarations. Permission classes themselves are derived from `side_effect_profile` per ADR-0005 (invariant 19); this section captures the irreversible-action allowlist surface used by harness category 6.

extends.description: Optional `extends` declarations per ADR-0005. Cross-field resolution to existing artifacts lives in ExtendsTargetValidator.

gates.description: Optional gate contributions per ADR-0005. Cross-pack stacking lives in GateCompositionValidator.

routing_hints.description: Optional L1 routing hints (keyword or tag with weight) consumed by the default scorer per ADR-0006.

compatible_with.description: Optional cross-pack compatibility declarations (invariant 24). Each declared compatibility MUST be backed by a fixture; that constraint is enforced by harness category 8, not this schema.
